hard_fail_conditions: any of {DNA, gene, cell, enzyme, protein-as-premise, fitness, hodgkin_huxley, michaelis_menten, lotka_volterra, hardy_weinberg} used as a PREMISE anywhere in the active files -- see prohibited_active_domain_tokens below; each may appear only as the label of a still-red/OPEN destination node or an explicit yellow bridge-partial connective

mixing LINE-2 textbook results (the curriculum 45/45 checklist, InfoEpidemicThreshold_attempt.v which imports the SIR model as a premise) into the LINE-1 root-native score -- LINE-1 and LINE-2 must NEVER be mixed; B-X8 exists solely to keep this boundary explicit and permanently red
citing InfoEpidemicThreshold_attempt.v as root-native anywhere -- it imports the SIR model as a premise and is REFUSED for LINE-1, checker-only

counting the retracted EGFR C797S same-ligand Jaccard gate, the EGFR contact-residue-count 'rescue' gate, or the PSII near-vs-far OEC gate as biology evidence anywhere -- all three are excluded, retracted Type-U (Gate Typing Law, readout_universe) or matched-by-a-zero-biology-control

claiming real biology, a real amino-acid/nucleotide sequence, a real protein/enzyme, a real cell, real heredity/fitness, or a calibrated encoding without independently-checked event-resolved (not synthetic) data

any gate in RULE_REGISTRY.json -> gates claimed status:green or status:closed WITHOUT both a passing_control and a failing_control present and machine-derived (Type-U convention) -- BG-CAL in particular must stay red with its 'NOT YET CONSTRUCTED' controls stated honestly, never silently upgraded
any RED (OPEN) node in ROOT_DAG_MASTER.md / CLOSURE_AUDIT.json claimed closed, upgraded to yellow or green, or claimed to have a passing witness that does not exist in biology_closure_v0_1.py
any YELLOW node (B-Y1..B-Y11) promoted to green without a new machine-derived witness with both controls, or without the calibrated-encoding gate (BG-CAL / B-X1) closing first
presenting B-Y10 (domain-discovery battery, SYNTHETIC tapes only) or B-Y11 (bR lineage ledger, architecture-only) as evidence of a real event-resolved run
a claim stronger than the declared tier BIOLOGY_ROOT_NATIVE_PARTIAL (see CLAIM_BOUNDARY.json)
the 36-node denominator in CLOSURE_AUDIT.json presented as coverage of 'all of biology' or of the LINE-2 textbook curriculum rather than of this specific Minimal Root-Native Biology DAG
the strict/weighted percentages (47.2% / 62.5%) recomputed by moving any red node (B-X1..B-X8) into yellow or green without a new machine-derived witness with both controls
missing verifier (biology_closure_v0_1.py), source_root snapshot, CLAIM_BOUNDARY.json, RULE_REGISTRY.json, ROOT_DAG_MASTER.md, CLOSURE_AUDIT.json, or run_tests.py

biology_closure_v0_1.py modified from its shipped exact-rational form (e.g. floats introduced, checks removed, network calls added) -- it is the immutable v0.1 anchor and must keep returning DECISION: PASS unmodified
unregistered active rule (a claim or equation appearing in code/docs with no corresponding rule_id in RULE_REGISTRY.json)
network or third-party runtime dependency introduced anywhere in the verification path

asserting that BIO-G1/G2/G3/G4/T2's structural closures alone license 'sequence'='amino-acid chain', 'function'='protein', 'living unit'='cell', or 'heredity'='real inheritance/fitness' without the corresponding calibrated encoding (B-X1) in the same breath
note_on_tokens: These names may appear in prose ONLY as explicit comparisons/disclaimers (e.g. 'this is not a real cell') or as the label of a still-RED/OPEN destination node (e.g. B-X4 'cell/organelle real semantics (OPEN)'). They fail the contract if activated as an imported PREMISE that any derivation or witness in biology_closure_v0_1.py or RULE_REGISTRY.json depends on.
